articles.title: JAC to close JTET 2026 registrations today for Primary and Upper Primary aspirants; check direct link here
articles.summary: Jharkhand TET 2026: The Jharkhand Academic Council (JAC) will close the online application process for JTET 2026 today, June 20, 2026, following an extension of the registration deadline. The state-level eligibility examination is conducted for candidates seeking teaching eligibility for Primary and Upper Primary schools in Jharkhand.

articles.title: BITSAT 2026 seat allotment result out today, counselling process moves to next stage
articles.summary: The BITSAT 2026 Iteration 1 seat allotment result has been released, marking the next stage of the admission process for candidates seeking admission to BITS Pilani, Goa and Hyderabad campuses. Applicants can check their allotment status through the official admission portal using their login credentials.

articles.title: MET 2026 Round 2 allotment result today; candidates must confirm admission by June 25
articles.summary: MAHE will release the MET 2026 Round 2 seat allotment result on June 20 after 8 PM through its official counselling portal. Candidates can check their allotment status by logging in with their application number and password.

articles.title: No IAS, no UPSC: How America's bureaucracy works without a permanent elite cadre
articles.summary: India's IAS-led bureaucracy is often compared with the United States, where no UPSC-style examination or IAS equivalent exists. Instead, a new US President can appoint roughly 4,000 political officials, while leadership positions listed in the government's Plum Book number around 8,000–9,000.
